## What
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Why
Explain the motivation or problem this solves.

## How
High-level approach or key changes made.

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases considered

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Before/after images for UI changes.

## Review Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows convention (`type: description`)
- [ ] Code is self-documenting with good variable names
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
- [ ] Performance considerations addressed
- [ ] Security considerations addressed

## Notes
Any additional context, concerns, or follow-up items.
